title: What’s changing
summary: A new Scheduled page, discoverable in the sidebar, gives users one place to view active tasks, see when they’ll run next, and pause, resume, edit, or delete them.All tasks are faster and more reliable.Users can schedule work for specific times or broader windows, such as morning, afternoon, or...

title: Availability and limits
summary: Rolling out to Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise users.Active task limits vary by tier. Tasks cannot run more than once per hour, and unattended tasks may automatically pause after a period of inactivity.

title: Update on Pulse
summary: Pulse is being sunset as proactive updates move into scheduled tasks. Pro users will continue to have access for 14 days from today. To keep receiving daily updates, you can ask ChatGPT to schedule a daily briefing based on your interests and past chats.

title: Availability
summary: These model picker updates are rolling out to Plus and Pro users on web, iOS, and Android globally today.

title: ChatGPT Images
summary: All images you create with ChatGPT are automatically saved under My images at https://chatgpt.com/images, giving you a single place to browse, revisit, and reuse your work without having to sift through past conversations. Learn more about ChatGPT Images in our ChatGPT Images FAQ.
